CREATE TABLE t_arr (arr Array(Tuple(subcolumn1 UInt32, subcolumn2 String))) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT getSubcolumn(arr, 'subcolumn1') AS sub1, getSubcolumn(arr, 'subcolumn2') AS sub2 FROM t_arr;
CREATE TABLE t_other (id UInt32, arr Array(Tuple(subcolumn1 UInt32, subcolumn2 String))) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id;
SELECT o.id, getSubcolumn(o.arr, 'subcolumn1') AS sub1 FROM t_other AS o WHERE o.id = 1;
CREATE TABLE t_nested (arr Array(Tuple(subcolumn1 UInt32, subcolumn2 String))) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
CREATE TABLE t_combined (arr1 Array(Tuple(a1 UInt32, a2 String)), arr2 Array(Tuple(b1 UInt32, b2 String))) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (a1, b1);
SELECT getSubcolumn(arr1, 'a1') AS a1_val, getSubcolumn(arr2, 'b1') AS b1_val FROM t_combined;
SELECT getSubcolumn(arr, 'subcolumn1') FROM (SELECT arr FROM t_arr) AS subquery;
SELECT getSubcolumn(arr, 'subcolumn2') FROM (SELECT arr FROM (SELECT arr FROM t_arr) AS subquery2) AS subquery1;
